pages.title: Vanilla+ Mods
pages.text: $(bold)Hoppers$(): $(li)[DONE] Work great with PreFabs $(li)Place hopper between chest and PreFab face $(li)Faster item transfer than direct chest$(br2)$(bold)Storage Drawers$(): $(li)[DONE] Compatible (exposes IItemHandler) $(li)Use for large storage capacity $(li)Good for high-throughput factories$(br2)$(bold)Ender Chests$(): $(li)[DONE] Can pull/push to Ender Chests $(li)Use for wireless item transport $(li)Connect multiple PreFabs via shared Ender Chest

pages.title: Modded Pipes (Item Transport)
pages.text: $(bold)Examples$(): Thermal Dynamics, Mekanism Pipes, Create Funnels$(br2)$(bold)Setup$(): [Chest] → [Pipe] → [PreFab Face]$(br2)$(bold)Compatibility$(): Should work if pipe acts as inventory$(br2)$(bold)Note$(): PreFab extracts from adjacent block (pipe must be adjacent to PreFab)

pages.title: AE2 / Refined Storage (Future)
pages.text: $(bold)Status$(): [WIP] Not yet implemented$(br2)$(bold)Planned$(): $(li)Factory Controller block $(li)Direct ME interface connection $(li)Autocrafting integration$(br2)$(bold)Current workaround$(): Use chests + ME import/export buses$(br2)---
